title: T-051 — UI parity: D365 DLQ admin screen and inspect/replay modals
prompt:
# T-051 — UI parity: D365 DLQ admin screen and inspect/replay modals

PRD/UX refs: SCR-08-06, MODAL-08-10, PROD-012, prototype labels dlq_screen,dlq_inspect_modal

Goal: Build D365 DLQ admin screen with payload inspect, replay and mark-resolved flows.

Implementation details:
Use Next.js App Router Server Components by default, shadcn/ui components, next-intl keys, org-scoped data access, loading/empty/error states, and literal data-prototype-label markers matching _meta/prototype-labels/prototype-index-production.json. Closeout must include desktop screenshots and Playwright traces. Match design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:499-557 and modals.jsx:280-326. The screen lives under /admin/integrations/d365/dlq and may be linked from Production sidebar for Prod Manager/Admin. Payload views are read-only; replay/resolve call T-042 actions.

Scope files:
- apps/web/app/admin/integrations/d365/dlq/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/components/production/dlq-inspect-modal.tsx [create]
- design/Monopilot Design System/production/other-screens.jsx:499-557
- design/Monopilot Design System/production/modals.jsx:280-326

Acceptance criteria:
1. DLQ screen matches prototype with empty/loading/error/open states
2. Replay and mark-resolved require confirmation/notes and show audit result
3. Closeout includes screenshots for empty and open DLQ plus inspect modal trace

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.
